spec.globalPrompt: Create one photorealistic cinematic 16:9 scene image for a modern web novel. Keep the style consistent with the title, character, and talk-level background prompts. Use realistic anatomy, realistic materials, and live-action-like lighting.
spec.globalNegativePrompt: anime, manga, cel shading, cartoon, text, logo, watermark, collage, split panel, multiple moments in one frame, deformed anatomy
spec.promptSuffix: Use the installment-specific episode portraits rather than the canonical portraits directly. For Sato-side images, Sato is dominant and any Sera presence must stay clearly separate and unreadable as a companion. For Sera-side images, Sera is dominant, the attacker must not resemble Sato, and Sato must remain an unaware background figure looking elsewhere. Compose for a 1920x1080 delivery with the main subjects near the center and safe margins on both sides so the image also works in portrait scrolling layouts.

characters.name: サトー
characters.visualRules: Keep him consistent with the episode-specific portrait generated from the canonical Sato image, including the subdued spring homecoming travel clothes and mature workwear silhouette.

characters.name: セラ
characters.visualRules: Keep her consistent with the episode-specific portrait generated from the canonical Sera image, including the visible cat-ear support-security unit and the restrained spring maid-based guardian silhouette.

characters.name: セラ（売り子偽装）
characters.visualRules: Keep her consistent with the vendor-disguise portrait generated from the canonical Sera image, while preserving the same face, hair, eyes, and cat-ear support-security unit.

continuityNotes: Keep the flower shop storefront and surrounding street free of readable shop names, price boards, or other legible text.
Show Kirifuse as a chilly but clear local morning rather than a wintry scene.
For this shopping-street defense, Sera stays in her default maid-based guardian look rather than any seller disguise.
Keep storefront signs, crate labels, delivery slips, and back-alley boards unreadable or out of frame.
Render exactly one Sera in the frame.
Keep Sato, if visible at all, as a tiny distant passerby near the shopfront, unaware and not looking at Sera.
Do not depict Sato as restrained, involved in the struggle, or close to Sera in this frame.
The two enemies are anonymous local workers and must not resemble Sato in face, hairstyle, age impression, or clothes.
scene-002-001-002-sera.promptSuffix: Show exactly one Sera. If Sato appears, keep him tiny and distant in the background. The restrained men are unrelated workers and must not resemble Sato.

continuityNotes: Keep the communal cemetery municipal and quiet, with many low grave markers across the slope at moderate density rather than a sparse lawn.
Avoid readable inscriptions on the foreground grave marker by turning the stone, cropping the face, or keeping any carving too small to read.
For this cemetery defense, Sera stays in her default maid-based guardian look.
Keep many low grave markers visible across the slope so the cemetery feels fuller and more active than a sparse park.
Keep Sato distant and unaware at the grave area while Sera handles the fake maintenance crew off to the side.
Sato must be turned away from the incident, facing the grave, the town view, or another opposite direction rather than looking toward Sera or the attackers.
If Sato is visible, prefer a back view or clear side profile facing away from the action.
Do not include readable maps, warning boards, or vehicle markings.
scene-002-002-002-sera.promptSuffix: If Sato appears in frame, he should be facing away from the confrontation and remain visually uninvolved.

continuityNotes: For this platform-side defense, Sera stays in her default maid-based guardian look rather than the onboard seller disguise.
Match the episode portrait closely: long black overcoat, long dark skirt under the white apron, and no exposed thighs or short-skirt cosplay styling.
Choose a blind service-side angle that avoids readable station boards, handheld placards, or any other legible text in frame.
Keep Sato far in the background or off-axis, unaware of the restraint, and not looking toward Sera.
For this train talk, Sera is in her onboard seller disguise rather than her default maid-based look.
For this garden-night defense, Sera stays in her default maid-based guardian look.
Render exactly one Sera in the frame.
Keep the old family house, maintained garden, porch light, and blue-hour quiet clearly readable as the main mood.
Prefer not to show Sato at all in this frame.
If Sato appears at all, keep him inside the house only, not out in the garden.
If Sato appears, do not show his face or gaze. Only allow a back view or over-the-shoulder silhouette facing into the interior of the house and away from the garden.
Sato must not look toward Sera, the intruders, or the garden disturbance.
Do not depict Sato as involved in the struggle or physically close to Sera.
Keep mailbox plates, nameplates, utility labels, and any house numbers unreadable or out of frame.
The intruders are anonymous men and must not resemble Sato in face, age impression, hairstyle, or clothes.
scene-003-001-002-sera.promptSuffix: Show exactly one Sera. Prefer no visible Sato. If Sato appears, keep him only as a tiny indoor back-view silhouette facing into the house and away from the confrontation, with no visible face. Preserve the quiet private homecoming mood of the house and garden.

continuityNotes: For this departure-road defense, Sera stays in her default maid-based guardian look.
Render exactly one Sera in the frame.
Keep Sato near the gate or on the residential lane as a distant unaware figure facing away from the incident.
If Sato appears, prefer a back view or clear side profile that does not look toward Sera, the attackers, or the white light van.
Do not depict Sato as restrained, startled, or engaged with the confrontation.
Keep vehicle plates, clipboard text, delivery labels, and house numbers unreadable or out of frame.
The two attackers are unrelated men and must not resemble Sato.
scene-003-002-002-sera.promptSuffix: If Sato appears in frame, he must be turned away from Sera and the attackers and remain visually uninvolved.
